optLocalRulesDesc.message: Processing happens entirely on your device. Fast, private, and works without an internet connection.

optAiModeDesc.message: Advanced neural analysis using large language models for superior classification accuracy and threat detection.

optNanoAiDesc.message: On-device LLM powered by Chrome's Gemini Nano. No API key needed, fully offline capable.

optNanoFlagsRequired.message: Chrome flags required to enable Nano AI

optNanoFlagsInstructions.message: Gemini Nano requires two Chrome flags to be enabled. Open each link below, set to Enabled, then relaunch Chrome.

optNanoFlagsNote.message: After enabling both flags and relaunching, return here and select Nano AI.

optNanoResetModel.message: to check model status and re-download if needed.

optAiModeInfo.message: AI Mode will smartly categorize your emails using your existing custom Gmail labels automatically.

optSmartCategoriesDesc.message: Define classification rules and keywords for your inbox

optAnonymousFeedbackDesc.message: Help improve Aegis by sharing anonymous category data (category labels and domains only — no email content or personal information).

optApiKeyRequired.message: Please enter an API Key first

optApiSuccess.message: API responded successfully! See raw data below:

optWhitelistUrlRequired.message: Please fill in the whitelist URL first

optNanoCheckFailed.message: Failed to check Gemini Nano availability.

catDialogSubtitle.message: Organize your emails with intelligent classification.

eulaIntro.message: Please read the following End User License Agreement carefully before using the Aegis extension.

eulaAgree.message: By using this extension, you agree to the following terms:

eulaClause1.message: 1. License Grant. You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Aegis Chrome Extension for personal, non-commercial purposes.

eulaClause2.message: 2. Data Collection. The extension may collect anonymous category-level data (such as email category labels and domain names) to improve classification accuracy. No personal email content, subject lines, full email addresses, or attachment data is ever collected.

eulaClause3.message: 3. Privacy. Your privacy is important to us. All data processing occurs locally in your browser unless you have opted in to anonymous data feedback. You may disable data feedback at any time from the Settings page.

eulaClause4.message: 4. No Warranty. This extension is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied.

eulaClause5.message: 5. Limitation of Liability. In no event shall the developers be liable for any damages arising from the use of this extension.

eulaClause6.message: 6. Modifications. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the extension constitutes acceptance of modified terms.

eulaDisclosureIntro.message: If you opt in to anonymous data feedback (optional, off by default), the following data may be sent to Aegis servers (aegis.penrose.services) to improve the community URL category database:

eulaDisclosureItem1.message: Email sender domains (e.g. notifications.amazon.com — never full email addresses)

eulaDisclosureItem2.message: URL domains found in email links (e.g. amazon.com)

eulaDisclosureItem3.message: Company names associated with senders (if available)

eulaDisclosureItem4.message: URL category corrections you submit via the feedback widget

eulaDisclosureNever.message: We NEVER collect: email subject lines, email body content, full email addresses, recipient information, attachments, passwords, browsing history, or any personal identification information.

eulaDisclosureThirdParty.message: If you enable AI Mode and provide your own API key, email metadata (subject and sender) will be sent to your chosen AI provider. This is entirely optional and requires your explicit configuration.

eulaConsentCheckbox.message: I agree to share anonymous domain-level data to help improve Aegis (optional — you can change this anytime in Settings)

eulaNotice.message: By clicking Accept, you agree to the terms above. Anonymous data feedback is OFF by default unless you check the box above.

nanoUnavailableFallback.message: Gemini Nano unavailable — results are based on keyword rules

nanoErrorFallback.message: AI error occurred — results are based on keyword rules

aiBatchPartialError.message: Some AI batches failed — a few emails may use keyword rules as fallback

fallbackModeKeyword.message: ⚠ Keyword fallback mode — AI classification unavailable

networkOfflineFallback.message: Network unavailable — switching to keyword rules
